description_long: This object consists of a tall, cylindrical lotion bottle with a smooth, matte white finish, paired with a rectangular outer box. The bottle is sleek and modern, with minimalistic branding and a subtle logo embossed near the base. The box features detailed printed text on the back and sides, including product information and usage instructions, while the front displays the brand 'esenka' and the product line 'Herit Age Collection.' The bottle appears to have a screw-on or pull-off cap, with no visible pump or dispenser mechanism. The packaging design is clean and elegant, with a small tree graphic and a touch of copper or bronze color at the base. Both the bottle and box are likely made of lightweight plastic and cardboard, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, matte white cylindrical lotion bottle with a matching rectangular box, featuring minimalist branding and a small tree graphic.
description_view_0: The back of the rectangular box is visible, showing detailed product information and a copper-colored accent at the base.
description_view_1: The side of the box with additional text is shown, alongside the plain, smooth side of the cylindrical bottle.
description_view_2: A top-down view reveals the pointed cap of the bottle and the flat top of the box, emphasizing their shapes.
description_view_3: The front of the box displays the 'esenka' brand, product line, and a small tree graphic, with the bottle's logo visible near its base.
